Site freshness

CEO oversight boundaries

  • Do not resend if Kit or state/kit_sent.json already shows a public send.
  • Rob approval required for duplicate-send risk, correction emails, sponsor mistakes, or affiliate trust incidents.
  • Public-safe v1 excludes private Kit metrics, subscriber counts, secrets, and workflow logs.

Source docs

This dashboard is generated by ops_status.py from repo and static site outputs. Live API integrations can be added later through Cloudflare Pages Functions after /ops/ is protected.
